name: Product Proof Contract
description: Requires a launch page or app surface to prove what exists instead of relying on aspirational claims.

rules.check: show commands, screenshots, generated files, URLs, repository paths, or concrete product surfaces
claims must point to a source, report, command output, or artifact
open-source product pages should include docs, install instructions, architecture, and contribution path
external proof widgets must have a readable fallback

remediation: Replace unsupported claims with inspectable proof artifacts, generated reports, screenshots, docs, and fallback behavior.
